title: polyscias austrocaledonica
intro: Polyscias austrocaledonica, also known as the Australian fan palm, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the Pacific island nations. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polyscias austrocaledonica include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, and supporting immune function. The leaves and roots of the plant are often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
